kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: At most one of the artisan with the Chisel and the artisan with 11 coins belongs to the Market Ward.
The artisan with the Saw does not belong to the River Ward.
Highrow goes with at least two of Edmund, Blacksmith, Loom, Pottery, and 9 coins.
The artisan who makes Saddles' levy is higher than both Cedric and the artisan with the Mallet.
Blacksmith, Saw, and Saddles go with 7 coins, 9 coins, and 11 coins, in some order.
Exactly one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the Market Ward.
The artisan who makes Pottery and the artisan with 11 coins are in different guilds.
Either Edmund goes with Saw, or Carpenter goes with Chisel — but not both.
Weaver goes with none of Bridgegate, Millpond, or 7 coins.
Everyone in the Clothiers' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Ironmongers' Guild.
7 coins goes with exactly four of Wulfric, Blacksmith, Mallet, Candles, and Oldwall.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: At most one of the angler using the Popper and the catch with 14 lb belongs to the South Watershed.
The angler using the Swimbait does not belong to the East Watershed.
Foxglen goes with at least two of Esther, Bass, Spinnerbait, Dough, and 13 lb.
The angler fishing with Nightcrawler's weight is higher than both Boone and the angler using the Spoon.
Bass, Swimbait, and Nightcrawler go with 12 lb, 13 lb, and 14 lb, in some order.
Exactly one member of the Sunfish Family is in the South Watershed.
The angler fishing with Dough and the catch with 14 lb are in different families.
Either Esther goes with Swimbait, or Catfish goes with Popper — but not both.
Trout goes with none of Birchpool, Grayreach, or 12 lb.
Everyone in the Pike Family ranks higher in weight than everyone in the Sunfish Family.
12 lb goes with exactly four of Wade, Bass, Spoon, Corn, and Pinehollow.
